entity.summary: Velas-based decentralized exchange designed for Cardano ecosystem assets, with a reachable first-party site and residual liquidity but almost no recent trading activity.
entity.notes: The first-party site and exchange links remain reachable and continue to describe AstroSwap as a Velas-hosted DEX for Cardano assets. Current protocol data preserves roughly $58,000 in TVL and cumulative exchange history, but 7-day and 30-day DEX volume are zero and 24-hour volume is negligible. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead.

evidence.title: AstroSwap official site
evidence.notes: The first-party site remains reachable, identifies AstroSwap as a Velas-hosted DEX for Cardano assets, and links to the trading application.

evidence.title: AstroSwap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data preserves residual Velas TVL and cumulative exchange volume while recent trading windows are effectively inactive.

evidence.title: AstroSwap protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Residual liquidity combined with zero 7-day and 30-day volume supports a limited classification.
